title: UI Component - Auth Forms
execution_steps: Run 'loom start TASK-039' to lock active context
Run 'loom context TASK-039' to ingest requirements
Create React component files in `frontend/src/components/` for Login and Registration
Implement UI layout using Tailwind CSS to match the Pathfinder aesthetic
Implement state management and API integration to `/auth/login` and `/auth/register`
Update `App.tsx` to conditionally render the Auth UI or the User Management dashboard based on authentication state
Run frontend tests or verify rendering locally
definition_of_done: React components implemented and rendering without errors
Tailwind CSS aesthetic is applied correctly
State management and API integration functional for Login and Registration
App conditionally renders main content only when authenticated
All modified source files have @trace annotation
